nasb.text: because they have acted foolishly in Israel, and have committed adultery with their neighbors’ wives and have spoken words in My name falsely, which I did not command them; and I am He who knows and am a witness,” declares the Lord.’ ”

esv.text: because they have done an outrageous thing in Israel, they have committed adultery with their neighbors’ wives, and they have spoken in my name lying words that I did not command them. I am the one who knows, and I am witness, declares the Lord.’”

cnv.text: 因為他們二人在以色列中行了無恥的事，他們和鄰舍的妻子通姦，又冒我的名說虛假的話，是我沒有吩咐他們說的。我知道一切，也可以作證。’這是耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 因为他们二人在以色列做了恶事，与他人的妻子通奸。我没有差派他们，他们却奉我的名说假预言。我知道他们的所作所为，我对这一切了如指掌。’这是耶和华说的。”
